evals.prompt: Let me browse the semantic model.
evals.expected_output: Opens the model-explorer dashboard (render_model_explorer.py). Renders all tables and columns with live search, exclude/include actions, and the embedded manifest JSON. Waits for chat back-channel commands (e.g. 'exclude table audit_log').

evals.prompt: Exclude the audit_log table from the model.
evals.expected_output: Parses the command, invokes apply_model_exclusions.py to flip review_state on audit_log, validates via validate_semantic_model.py, commits to the per-profile git repo, and re-renders the dashboard. Refuses silently if audit_log is not present.
